description: This pipeline creates annotations for paths based on their names or full paths and then uses these annotated paths to list all subfolders, effectively organizing and processing folder structures in a systematic manner.

89849824-53a6-437f-ab06-9ef6aa51f091.name: path-to-annotation-simple
89849824-53a6-437f-ab06-9ef6aa51f091.description: Creates an annotation for each path based on its name or its full path.
